exploration_notes: Investigation traced the duplicate response header issue through 4+ packages. The causal chain starts at the router filter's timeout/abort handling (router.cc), which calls sendLocalReply with a modify_headers callback. The filter manager's sendLocalReplyViaFilterChain (filter_manager.cc) constructs an EncodeFunctions struct whose modify_headers_ lambda calls finalizeHeaders() — a free function that unconditionally invokes route->routeEntry()->finalizeResponseHeaders() (config_impl.cc).
